name: 11L XSA4 + EMA (PR379 base) - SDTTT disabled for legality
author: Nathan Maine
blurb: PR379 architecture (XSA4, EMA, int6+zstd). Originally submitted with SDTTT eval-time adaptation, flagged by @MatoTeziTanka on 2026-04-12 as TTT-on-val. Updated to report pre-SDTTT post-swa numbers (3-seed mean 1.1455). SDTTT path remains in the code but defaults to disabled.
legality_note: Previous submission reported final_int6_sliding_window numbers (mean 1.1287) which were computed after SDTTT adapted on val_tokens for 2 epochs. That violates score-first discipline per Issue #402 and Issue #677. Reporting the clean post_swa (pre-SDTTT) numbers from the same 3-seed runs instead. SDTTT path is still in train_gpt.py but defaults to SDTTT_ENABLED=0.
